title: Shikha Mukerjee | Can United Opp. Force PM To Pause Women Bill Rush?
description: A structural change of the magnitude that Mr Modi wants to rush into making -- bumping up the number of seats to 816 in the Lok Sabha, up from 543 seats, and reserving one-third of the 816 seats for women -- based on a delimitation of constituencies on population data from 2011, even as the population head count exercise for Census 2026 is underway makes no sense
